summary: Do not ship yet. R-1, R-2, and R-4 are resolved, and no new critical issue was found, but R-3 still lacks auditable 20-run verification evidence.

findings.title: Missing verification: repeated-race output is synthesized
findings.body: The plan requires the probabilistic regression to pass 20/20, but the block labeled as raw 20-run output contains hand-added run prefixes and literal `...` on every line. The script-owned record proves only one GREEN execution, so no committed artifact substantiates the claimed 20/20 repetition. This leaves a required release claim unauditable.
findings.recommendation: Commit unabridged output and exit status for every repeated run, captured by the pipeline rather than reconstructed, then refresh verification.md.

next_steps: Replace the summarized 20-run block with committed raw evidence and repeat the scoped release review.
